strDesc: A reinforced canvas sack, sized and stitched for one job: holding trash and nothing else. Single-type by construction.
An oversized industrial bucket built for bulk salvage. Stays put -- drag it to where you want it. Accepts trash only.

A self-service kiosk stocked with single-type containers: sacks for wear-and-carry, buckets for bulk floor storage. One container, one item type.
